name: focus client beam FX parity batch
implemented: client-only bridge for original Thaumcraft.proxy focus FX call sites
shock sparkle cloud and FXLightningBolt-style segmented electric path
excavation beamCont adapter using original type=2 color=65382 and impact/endMod semantics
excavateFX adapter routed to LevelRenderer.destroyBlockProgress with original progress scale 0..9
forbidden_drift: no invented projectile visuals beyond adapters for TC4 FX calls
adapter_notes: 1.7.10 GL particle classes cannot be copied directly into the 1.19.2 renderer; TC4ClientFocusFx preserves call constants using 1.19.2 particles.
